title: Bee Removal in Hamilton Heights, Manhattan | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional bee removal services in Hamilton Heights, Manhattan. Safe, humane bee extraction from $350-$550. Serving historic brownstones & apartment buildings. Call today!
intro: Hamilton Heights residents facing bee infestations need fast, professional solutions that protect both families and these important pollinators. Our expert bee removal services safely extract colonies from the neighborhood's historic brownstones, pre-war apartment buildings, and Hamilton Terrace homes. Best Pest Control NYC offers comprehensive bee removal in Hamilton Heights for $350-$550, ensuring your property is bee-free while relocating colonies humanely.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC specializes in Hamilton Heights' unique architectural challenges, from century-old brownstones along Convent Avenue to mid-rise buildings near City College. Our technicians are fully licensed, insured, and experienced in safely removing bee colonies without damaging your property's historic features or structural integrity.
localContext: Hamilton Heights' tree-lined streets and proximity to St. Nicholas Park and Riverside Drive create ideal habitats for bee colonies, particularly in wall cavities of vintage buildings and attic spaces. The neighborhood's mix of landmarked properties and residential complexes requires careful, preservation-conscious pest control approaches that respect Hamilton Heights' rich architectural heritage.

faqs.question: How much does bee removal cost in Hamilton Heights?
faqs.answer: Bee removal in Hamilton Heights typically costs between $350 and $550, depending on the colony size, location accessibility, and whether structural repairs are needed. We provide free inspections and transparent pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Do you remove bees from historic Hamilton Heights brownstones?
faqs.answer: Yes, we specialize in bee removal from Hamilton Heights' historic brownstones and landmarked properties. Our methods are designed to protect original architectural features while safely extracting bee colonies from walls, chimneys, and roof spaces.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a bee problem in Hamilton Heights?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout Hamilton Heights. Once you contact us, we'll schedule an inspection within 24 hours and can typically complete bee removal within 1-2 days depending on colony complexity.

faqs.question: Are the bees relocated or exterminated?
faqs.answer: Whenever possible, we humanely relocate bee colonies to safe apiaries outside the city, as bees are vital pollinators. We only use extermination as a last resort when relocation isn't feasible due to colony health or safety concerns.
